owned_files.notes: Complete storage + indexing for Shamir share recovery (Phase 4 PR 1). Implements recovery_share_v1 indexing (opaque ciphertext), recovery_request_v1 (flow initiation), recovery_approval_v1 (threshold tracking). Tests: shares_index_after_storage, guardian_can_list_their_shares, malformed_share_is_not_indexed, no_recovery_setup_returns_none. Guardian validation, threshold checking built in.

HTTP API endpoints: GET /api/v2/recovery/setup/{holder_did}, GET /api/v2/recovery/shares-held-by/{guardian_did}, GET /api/v2/recovery/request/{request_object_id}. Routes return setup config, shares held, and request status with approval list. Client-side Shamir lib deferred to Phase 4 PR 2.

summary: Recovery scope complete: share storage, request/approval flow, threshold mechanics all shipped. Awaiting Phase 4 PR 2 for client-side Shamir + automatic key rotation (next gap per completion_check).
